apiId.description: API Gateway HTTP API ID, when public ingress is enabled.

eventbridgePermissionStatementIds.description: Lambda permission statement IDs granted for EventBridge schedule triggers.

eventbridgeRuleNames.description: EventBridge rule names for schedule triggers.

integrationId.description: API Gateway integration ID, when public ingress is enabled.

routeId.description: API Gateway route ID, when public ingress is enabled.

s3PermissionStatementIds.description: Lambda permission statement IDs granted for S3 storage triggers.

stageName.description: API Gateway stage name, when public ingress is enabled.

url.description: Public HTTPS URL, when public ingress is enabled.
